text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After finishing training for the day...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your guidance today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Satono Diamond's gaze to find Kitasan
Black training hard.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Almost there! Just one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Trainer. Actually, would you mind if I did
some additional exercise today?
choice_data_list: You shouldn't push yourself too hard...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's just... I saw a video of Kita racing the other
day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's improved quite a bit. She's gotten much
faster...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It made me a bit nervous. But more than that... it
made me want to run so badly!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's like she's lit a fire under me! So... please say
yes!
choice_data_list: If that's how you feel, then, go for it!
If that's how you feel, then, go for it!
Let's save that fire for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's like she's lit a fire under me! So... please say
yes!
choice_data_list: If that's how you feel, then, go for it!
If that's how you feel, then, go for it!
Let's save that fire for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Okay, I'm going to run some
more!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to let you beat me, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with thoughts of her rival driving her
forward, Satono Diamond executes a brilliant
solo training session.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow? Um... I really don't think I can wait
that long!
choice_data_list: Bottle up those feelings and let them explode.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...I understand. But promise me I can train to my
heart's content tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...In that case! Let's watch that video of her in
your office for today!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That way, I'm sure I'll get even more excited and I
can work even harder tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we study Kitasan Black's race intently
while Satono Diamond provides a passionate
commentary.
